what chaos character should i pull for free?
im sure i wanna start my journey with chaos.. i like to keep it simple.. bunch of healing and shield while having a solid dps
can i do a poison or a counter build using pure chaos realm?

Ye, altho better units for counter exist in ultra (Daff and 24 on ultra)
Chaos has Lily for most of the poison stacking and tanking and Nymph for the triggers
I know that Liz is pretty good as a poison unit if you invest heavily on her, which is both easy (shes a standard) and hard (it's gonna take a while) to do Imo

Pure chaos has some comps with Kathigura and uh
Mouchette

But I don't think you can get Mouchette and I honestly can't recall if Kathi is still on banner or if it just got changed
Forgot to mention Gdoll, but I think Gdoll poison also requires quite a bit of investment

Oh yeah wanda also does counter in ultra, but her rep is complicated due to her numbers being flat instead of percentage based

This however is just what I've heard as I don't even possess Wanda
Pandia also suffers from a similar issue as far as Im aware, you can ask for Kade's opinions if you plan on running a pure chaos counter team due to his Pandia expertise
You actually can still get Mouchette
It's just a matter of money
That's what a broke person would say
I still wonder when Mouchette is gonna come back
I don't want to wait every month for 1 shard.

You can also check the compendium for some example team builds and fish for stuff on yt vids

If you just wanna have fun then mix and match stuff on your own, I reckon pure counter chaos is mostly comprised of naut, pandia, and two random dudes who don't actually provide any counter nor shield
Maybe ramona and doll? Or ogi? Alva???
